phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dov'è l'ingresso principale, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, doh-VEH leen-GRES-so preen-chee-PAH-leh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: At the main entrance, on the right.

responses.english: At the main entrance, on the right.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dove si trova la biglietteria, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, DOH-veh see TROH-vah lah bee-lyeh-tteh-REE-ah, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: At the ticket office, on the right.

responses.english: At the ticket office, on the right.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, a che ora apre oggi, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, ah keh OH-rah AH-preh OJ-jee, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: The hours are posted at the entrance.

responses.english: The hours are posted at the entrance.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, quanto costa il biglietto, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, KWAN-toh KOS-tah eel bee-lyeh-TTOH, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: It is indicated at the ticket office.

responses.english: It is indicated at the ticket office.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, posso ascoltare la dimostrazione acustica?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, POS-soh as-kol-TAH-reh lah dee-mo-strah-TSYOH-neh ah-KOO-stee-kah

likely_response.local: Sì, ogni mezz'ora con la guida.
likely_response.pronunciation: SÌ OHJ-nee mehtsts-'OH-rah KOHN LAH goo-EE-dah
likely_response.translation_en: Yes, every half hour with the guide.

responses.english: Yes, every half hour with the guide.
responses.phonetic: SÌ OHJ-nee mehtsts-'OH-rah KOHN LAH goo-EE-dah
responses.french: Sì, ogni mezz'ora con la guida.
